creator: terry-freebsd@glaver.org
text:
The dynamips-devel port reports:

** Port marked as IGNORE: emulators/dynamips-devel:
        is marked as broken: Does not fetch

However, distcache.freebsd.org does have a copy:

=> dynamips-0.2.8-RC2.tar.gz doesn't seem to exist in /usr/ports/distfiles/.
=> Attempting to fetch http://www.ipflow.utc.fr/dynamips/dynamips-0.2.8-RC2.tar.gz
fetch: http://www.ipflow.utc.fr/dynamips/dynamips-0.2.8-RC2.tar.gz: No address r
ecord
=> Attempting to fetch http://distcache.FreeBSD.org/ports-distfiles/dynamips-0.2.8-RC2.tar.gz
dynamips-0.2.8-RC2.tar.gz                     100% of  565 kB 3628 kBps 00m00s
